subject: Multi-format shoot across Dezerland's experiences
body:
Hi Ashley,

The Pinball Palace — 90+ machines in one room — is a visual that most social accounts never capture properly. And the Batcave in the Auto Museum is the kind of set piece people screenshot.

I'm Mal, an Orlando UGC creator. I produce photo and video for attractions and hospitality brands — portfolio at https://worldwidewmal.com.

Dezerland is built for a multi-format shoot: one session yields a 30-second hero Reel moving across four or five experiences (karting, Pinball Palace, Toxic Blast, Batcave), plus individual still carousels for each zone. Content that covers your whole Instagram grid in a day.

Would this be useful for your content calendar?

— Mal
